nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 65, with temperatures rising to around 67 overnight. South wind around 5 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 4pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 82. South southeast wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

South southeast wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
